creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun 30 mar 08 at 19:20:02 +0200, thierry@FreeBSD.org <thierry@FreeBSD.org>
 wrote:

> - sorry, there is a long time since your PR, and in the meantime this
> tarball has been removed from a lot of mirrors; could you please update
> it to the latest release, in order to make it fetchable easily?
> 
> - USE_X_PREFIX implies a dependency on all the X libs; a dependency on
> x11-fonts/fontconfig would be sufficient;
> 
> - it would be fine to run fc-cache during the post-installation (e.g.
> see x11-fonts/webfonts).

And I've forgotten the latest point:

- Why did you set PORTVERSION to 1.0? It would be better to use the
release number of the tarball, i.e. 0.5.0 or 0.5.1.

Regards,
-- 
Th. Thomas.
